7 = Recirculation

rows.Description:
Select temperature control type:
0=Const.supply air
1=Outdoor compensated supply air
2=Cascade room temp control
3=Extract temp control
4=Outdoor dependent supply or room temp
5=Outdoor dependent supply or extract temp
6=Cascade outdoor compensated room temp control
7=Cascade outdoor compensated extract temp control
8=Extract air depending supply air temperature
rows.Modbus Description without <CR>: Select temperature control type:0=Const.supply air1=Outdoor compensated supply air2=Cascade room temp control3=Extract temp control4=Outdoor dependent supply or room temp5=Outdoor dependent supply or extract temp6=Cascade outdoor compensated room temp control7=Cascade outdoor compensated extract temp control8=Extract air depending supply air temperature
